text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm out for a walk on my day off when I spot a downcast Mayano Top
Gun.

text_block_list.name: Maya's Friend A
text_block_list.text:
Oh hey, it's Maya! Hey, Maya! We were talking about going shopping
after this. Wanna join us?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... Sorry, but I think I'm gonna pass this time. I have to head out
now.

text_block_list.name: Maya's Friend B
text_block_list.text: Head out? Where?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna go see some airplanes!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh... hi.
choice_data_list:
You seem to be out of spirits. What's the
matter?

You seem to be out of spirits. What's the
matter?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hrmmmm...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Let's talk about something else. Are you free?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Or... busy, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Mayano wants me to stay, so I decide to accompany her
for the day.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Touchdown! Ehehe, we're finally here! ♪ It's a bit far from the
academy, but I like this place a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look at that! That plane has a special wrap! Wooow! They even
have a Beluga here!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yep! You see that white plane? The one that looks like it has a giant
head? It's named Beluga after the whale! It looks like that 'cause it
has to carry other planes inside of it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You don't get to see them often, so we're super lucky today! ♪ Oh
right, I should take a picture while I'm here...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Three... two... one... Cheese! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nice, this one turned out great! ☆ Heh-heh... Looks as cute as ever...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I mean, c'mon. The sky is full of all sorts of exciting things! And planes go zoooom right through it!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So of course I like planes! Who wouldn't?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Actually, my dad really likes planes too! He likes them so much that
he became a pilot!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So on his days off, he'd bring me to the airport like this and show me
the different planes! And then we'd go shopping after we were done
looking!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh... It's nothing! No big deal.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Enough about that. I'm starving! Let's go grab a bite to eat or
something! There's a lot of good food at airports!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And after we're done eating, we can walk around some more!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: First, we'll go shopping! I wanna buy some stuff for my friends.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I need to buy something for Marvey and Teio... Oh, and for Yukipe,
Biko, and Flower too!
choice_data_list: You sure do have a lot of friends, Mayano.
You sure do have a lot of friends, Mayano.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hold up, we can't waste our time just standing around like this! C'mon,
let's go! Hurry!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This day will go down as "The Greatest Airport Adventure in Maya's
Life"! It's time for takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After eating together, we have fun walking around the airport from
store to store, checking out everything it has to offer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Eventually...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Wait, it's already this late?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It'll take some time to get back to the academy. We gotta get back
before curfew, so I guess we should head out...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try thinking of ways to cheer her up, when suddenly, the Beluga she
told me about earlier pops into my field of vision.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As it makes its way towards the runway for takeoff, I come up with an
idea.
choice_data_list:
Hey, Mayano. How about we stop by the
observation deck?

Hey, Mayano. How about we stop by the
observation deck?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? But why? ...Oh, wait!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: The Beluga's taking off! Whoa, I wanna see it fly!
choice_data_list: If we get back late, I'll go apologize with you.
If we get back late, I'll go apologize with you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You will?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay, to the observation deck we go! Takeoff!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoooa! Wooow! Did you see that?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: It was all like boooom, and then it went like peeeew. "Beluga" really is the perfect name for it... It's like a whale that swims through the sky!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looking at Mayano staring off into the sky from the observation deck,
I can see that she's back to her usual cheery self.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Nice! We made it juuust in time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! A fun end to a fun day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I reeeeally had a lot of fun today! Like, so, so, so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Mom and Dad aren't here at the academy. It's totally fine, but...
sometimes I think about how I'm here by myself, and it makes me feel
kinda... lonely, I guess.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But I have soooo many friends, and now I have you too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Let's go on another adventure together sometime, okay?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun furiously waves her hand then makes her way back
to her dorm.
